title: BoundaryEnvelope
description: Target machine-only boundary envelope passed from the front layer into the agent loop. It records session, locator, attachment, schedule, safety, language, and request-length facts, but it must not carry ordinary semantic routing authority, answer text, or raw user natural language.

raw_chars.description: Character count of the current request. Do not store raw user text here.

language_hint.description: Machine language/script hint such as zh-CN, en, mixed, or null when unknown.

schedule_intent.description: Structured schedule payload when the turn is a scheduler boundary operation.

attachment_refs.description: Stable machine refs for current-turn attachments, not filenames guessed from prose.

explicit_locators.description: Explicit locator tokens or refs extracted from the request or attachments.

active_task_reference.description: Machine token for active-task binding, reuse, replacement, or null.

session_binding.description: Machine token for resume/session binding, or null.

safety_budget_hint.description: Machine safety or budget hint from the front layer, or null.
